description: Android Device Provisioning is Google's zero-touch enrollment service for Android devices. It lets resellers, enterprise customers, and EMM providers manage enrollment accounts, device claims, and provisioning configurations programmatically.
summary: Google's Android Device Provisioning service exposes one REST API at https://androiddeviceprovisioning.googleapis.com/ for zero-touch enrollment, documented as reseller and customer views, authenticated with either Google OAuth user tokens (customer API) or linked Google service accounts.
